name: avir-trekkers
description: Avir Trekkers - Trekking & Social Impact Platform

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:user" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build: npm run build:user && npm run build:admin
scripts.lint: concurrently "cd apps/api && npm run lint" "cd apps/user-site && npm run lint" "cd apps/admin-portal && npm run lint"
